---
title: "semantic_probe.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\scripts\empire\semantic_probe.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.45
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 9.02
overall_score: 5.10
---

## Intent
The `semantic_probe.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SemanticProbe, __init__, assert_semantic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SemanticProbe, __init__, assert_semantic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)

### Exports
- `SemanticProbe`
- `__init__`
- `assert_semantic`
